hero.fallback_tagline: Ka whakatau au i ngā raru uaua, ka hanga pūmanawa e mau tonu ana.

about.title: Mōku
about.subtitle: Te kaipūkaha i muri i te mahi
about.fallback_bio: He kaipūkaha pūmanawa ahau e akiakihia ana e te hiahia mōhio me te aroha ki te whakatau raruraru uaua. E tino aro ana ahau ki te tuhi waehere mā, ngāwari ki te tiaki, me te hanga pūnaha e mau ana ki te whakamātautau o te wā.

skills.title: Pūkenga me ngā Hangarau
skills.subtitle: He aha te kaha o taku mahi

projects.subtitle: Mai i te ariā ki te whakaputa
projects.all_subtitle: He whakaaturanga o aku mahi kaipūkaha
projects.all_meta_description: He whakaaturanga o aku mahi kaipūkaha.
projects.no_preview: Kei te haere mai te arokite
projects.no_description: Kei te haere mai te rangahau katoa.
projects.no_filter_results: Kāore he kaupapa e ōrite ana ki te tātari kua kōwhiria.

experience.title: Wheako
experience.subtitle: I whea ahau i whai pānga ai

contact.title: Whakapā Mai

contact.meta_description: Whakapā mai ki te kōrero mō tētahi kaupapa, tētahi āheinga rānei.
contact.success: Kua tukuna te karere! Ka whakahoki kōrero tere.

not_found.title: Kāore i Kitea te Whārangi
not_found.description: Ko te whārangi e rapu ana koe kāore i te tū, kua nekehia rānei.
